programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: An appreciation for the finer things gave Forrest a drive to acquire an excess of unique items that overtook his home inside and out. He is now facing financial pressure from by receiving daily fines.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 70-year-old Jenny is rushed into the emergency department with left sided weakness and problems with her speech, whilst 81-year-old Brian has facial droop and spinal tingling.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: The ladies' Italian adventure ends with a final dinner that fractures friendships. In Beverly Hills, Dorit shoots her book cover, Boz house-hunts with Keely, and Rachel plans a disco birthday.

programs.title: Snapped
programs.desc: Kyle and Amanda finally get their summer back on track, but will the peace last? A comment at Amanda's birthday dinner lands Bailey in hot water with Ben. West confides in Ben about Ciara.

programs.title: A Plan To Kill
programs.desc: When a loving couple is discovered murdered execution-style in front of their Kansas home, police race to uncover the truth about who wanted them dead.
